name: Best Practice Flooring LLC
tagline: Tile & Flooring — Installed by Ake, Coordinated by Sarah
description: Husband-and-wife flooring team specializing in tile installation across Corvallis, Independence & the Mid-Willamette Valley. Ake installs every floor personally.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.description: Our specialty. Ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone tile for floors, showers, backsplashes, and more. Precision cuts, level work, beautiful results.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.description: Classic hardwood installation, refinishing, and repair. Solid and engineered options in oak, maple, walnut, and more.

services.name: Luxury Vinyl Plank
services.description: Waterproof luxury vinyl plank flooring — durable, beautiful, and perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and high-traffic areas.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.description: Affordable laminate flooring that looks like real wood or stone. Quick installation with lasting durability.
